## 🐛 Bug Description
<!-- A clear and concise description of what the bug is. -->

## 🔄 Reproduction Steps
<!-- Steps to reproduce the behavior -->

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '....'
3. Scroll down to '....'
4. See error

## 💻 Expected Behavior
<!-- A clear and concise description of what you expected to happen. -->

## 📸 Actual Behavior
<!-- A clear and concise description of what actually happened. -->
<!-- Include screenshots if helpful -->

## 🖥️ Environment Information
<!-- Please complete the following information -->

- **OS**: [e.g. Ubuntu 20.04, macOS 13.0, Windows 11]
- **Rust Version**: [e.g. rustc 1.70.0]
- **Ferriprove Version**: [e.g. 0.0.1]
- **Lean Version**: [e.g. 4.0.0] (if applicable)

## 📋 Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context about the problem here. -->

## 📚 Code Examples
<!-- If applicable, add code examples to help explain your problem -->

```rust
// Add code example here
```

## 🔍 Debug Information
<!-- If you have any debug output or logs, please include them -->

```
// Add logs or debug output here
```

## ✅ Possible Solutions
<!-- If you have any ideas on how to fix this, please let us know -->

## 📊 Priority
<!-- How urgent is this bug? -->

- [ ] 🔴 Critical - Blocks development/usage
- [ ] 🟡 High - Significant impact
- [ ] 🟢 Medium - Minor impact
- [ ] 🔵 Low - Nice to have
